title: Cobblemon PC Exporter
description: A client-side mod that exports your Cobblemon PC box data to an excel (.xlsx) workbook with images of the Pokémon.
body:
# Cobblemon PC Export

A lightweight client-side mod that exports your Cobblemon PC box data to an excel (.xlsx) workbook with images of the Pokémon.

## Features
Every Pokémon is exported as a detailed row, plus the mod allows for a complete control over what fields are exported to excel. 

- Box #
- Slot #
- Box Name
- PC UUID
- Species
- Dex #
- Form
- Nickname
- UUID
- Level
- XP
- Friendship
- Shiny
- Gender
- Tera Type
- Primary Type
- Secondary Type
- All Types
- Aspects
- Size
- Held Item Visible
- Marks
- Markings
- Cosmetic Item
- Ability Name
- Ability Description
- Original Nature
- Minted Nature
- Current Nature
- Original Trainer UUID
- Original Trainer Name (Not reliable, use UUID and NameMC).
- Caught Ball
- Held Item
- IVs (HP/ATK/DEF/SP.ATK/SP.DEF/SPD)
- EVs (HP/ATK/DEF/SP.ATK/SP.DEF/SPD)
- Stats (HP/ATK/DEF/SP.ATK/SP.DEF/SPD)
- Base (HP/ATK/DEF/SP.ATK/SP.DEF/SPD)
- Height (m)
- Weight (kg)
- Moves 1–4 (Name, Type, Category, Power, Accuracy, Max PP)
- Benched Moves


## How to Use

Option 1: 
Export while in the Cobblemon PC!
1. Open your Cobblemon PC in-game.
2. Press **F9** (default keybind) to export the currently visible box to an Excel file.
3. The output folder will open automatically when the export finishes.

Option 2:
You can use the /pcexport chat command to quickly export multiple boxes. When playing multiplayer you may have to open your PC box at least once before using the chat command to export.

```
/pcexport 1          → Export Box 1
/pcexport 1,2,3      → Export Boxes 1, 2, and 3
```

It is recommended to allocate **at least 6gb** of memory to Minecraft to prevent your client from crashing when trying to export a large number of PC boxes filled with Pokemon.

```
/pcexport all        → Export all boxes ("Disable Export Limits" must be set to yes in settings first)
```

*Not affiliated with the official Cobblemon project.*
